bugs.error_message: TypeError: Object of type float32 is not JSON serializable
bugs.root_cause: YuNet returns numpy.float32; select_yunet() returned raw numpy floats → State → json.dumps() crash
bugs.fix: Cast to Python float() in select_yunet(); add _NumpyEncoder safety net in debug_server

bugs.error_message: Same person registered as multiple IDs in face_db.json
bugs.root_cause: match() only individual embedding sim; large angle drops below 0.35; _face_key 40px grid splits pending counter
bugs.fix: match() centroid matching; update_embedding() max_sim<0.20 rejection; _face_key 80px; auto_merge() cross-sim>0.50
Changed to env var REALTIME_MODEL with correct default

bugs.error_message: Gate logic: == should be != (whitelist vs blacklist)
bugs.root_cause: Blacklist gate (state==X block) left new states blocked by default → silence → disconnect
bugs.fix: Whitelist: only gate when state==ST_TRACKING; all other states pass through

bugs.error_message: vis_ready等待期间行为循环每帧(0.05s)打log,唤醒后日志被刷屏20+行
bugs.root_cause: behavior_loop中vis_ready检查在while循环内无节流,每帧都log
bugs.fix: 添加_vis_wait_logged标记,只在首次打一行log,就绪后重置

bugs.error_message: Dashboard conversation log把robot的声音当成用户的声音(如"哈喽大大")
bugs.root_cause: display_transcript的assistant条目显示[大大]人名标签,用户误认为大大说的
bugs.fix: 只在role=user时显示人名标签,assistant条目不显示人名(已有🔊图标区分)

bugs.error_message: WS连接在快速切换后1秒内死亡(code=None msg=None),重连也立即死亡
bugs.root_cause: close_session和open_session之间无间隔,快速连续创建会话触发服务端限制或资源未释放
